title: MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 Notification OUT, Apply Online for 41 Vacancies @mpphscl.in, Check Eligibility, Salary, Last Date
shortInfo: Madhya Pradesh Public Health Services Corporation Limited (MPPHSCL) has released the MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 notification at its official website @mpphscl.in. A total of 41 vacancies across 18 posts have been announced for Managers, Consultants, Engineers, Legal Officers, and Office Assistants on contract/deputation basis. Online applications opened on 25th May 2026 and the last date to apply is 24th June 2026. The age limit is calculated as on 01.01.2026. Applications are accepted through MP Online only. The exam will be conducted by MP Online, followed by an interview by MPPHSCL's HR Commit

basic_details.job_title: MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 Notification OUT, Apply Online for 41 Vacancies @mpphscl.in, Check Eligibility, Salary, Last Date
basic_details.short_information: Madhya Pradesh Public Health Services Corporation Limited (MPPHSCL) has released the MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 notification at its official website @mpphscl.in. A total of 41 vacancies across 18 posts have been announced for Managers, Consultants, Engineers, Legal Officers, and Office Assistants on contract/deputation basis. Online applications opened on 25th May 2026 and the last date to apply is 24th June 2026. The age limit is calculated as on 01.01.2026. Applications are accepted through MP Online only. The exam will be conducted by MP Online, followed by an interview by MPPHSCL's HR Commit

important_dates.interview_date: To be announced on MP Online website

qualification.details: The age limit for MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 is as follows, calculated as on 01.01.2026: | General Category: 18 to 40 years SC, ST, OBC, Government/Nigam/Mandal/Autonomous Org. Employees, Nagar Sainik, Handicapped, Women (Unreserved/Reserved): 18 to 45 years (Maximum 5 years relaxation) | Age relaxation will be as per General Administration Department rules/guidelines of the MP Government. | The qualification varies by post. Key requirements are summarised below: | Full TOR (Terms of Reference) and detailed job descriptions for each post are available in the official Rule Book 2026 on the MPPHSCL website.

salary_details.details: All posts under MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 are contractual. The exact monthly pay for each post is given below. | For Deputation candidates: Pay will be based on their pay scale in the parent department as per the Last Pay Certificate (LPC). PF benefits are provided for direct contract appointments.

selection_process: The selection process for MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 involves the following stages:
Stage 1 - Shortlisting by MP Online MP Online will shortlist and scrutinise applications received online. A shortlist of 5 candidates per vacancy will be prepared.
Stage 2 - Written Examination The exam will be conducted by MP Online. The syllabus for the exam will be published on the MP Online website.

Stage 3 - Interview by HR Committee / Selection Committee Candidates who qualify the exam will be called for an interview conducted by the MPPHSCL HR Committee / Selection Committee. For deputation candidates
direct interview by the HR Committee will be held.
Stage 4 - Final Selection The HR Committee / Selection Committee will recommend candidates to the Managing Director
MPPHSCL based on final marks. The Managing Director's decision will be final and binding.
Tiebreaker Rules (if two or more candidates score equally): Priority will be given in the following order: (a) more experienced candidate
(b) higher educational qualification
(c) computer knowledge.
Waiting List: A waiting list of candidates (excluding the selected candidate) will be prepared and will remain valid for 1 year.
Merit Calculation:
Marks will be calculated up to 2 decimal places. Selected candidates will be notified via email and SMS to their registered mobile number.
how_to_apply: Online applications for MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 must be submitted through MP Online. Follow the steps below:
Visit the official MPPHSCL website at https://mpphscl.mp.gov.in or the MP Online portal.
Click on the MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 notification link.
Register on MP Online if you haven't already - enter your mobile number and email ID carefully as all communications will be sent there.
Fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and professional details.

Upload scanned copies of the following self-certified documents: High School / 10+2 mark sheet Minimum qualification mark sheet as prescribed for the post Graduation / Post-Graduation degree from a recognised university Valid caste certificate (issued by competent authority) Experience certificate from last employer Last pay slip and appointment letter from current employer
High School / 10+2 mark sheet
Minimum qualification mark sheet as prescribed for the post
Graduation / Post-Graduation degree from a recognised university
Valid caste certificate (issued by competent authority)
Experience certificate from last employer
Last pay slip and appointment letter from current employer
Pay the application fee online through MP Online.
Submit the application before 24th June 2026.
Use the correction window (22nd June to 25th June 2026) to fix any errors in the application.
Important: Candidates must provide a valid mobile number and email ID. Communication regarding shortlisting, exam, and interview will be sent only to the registered email/mobile.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application and pay the application fee is 24th June 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: MPPHSCL has released a total of 41 vacancies across 18 posts including General Managers, Managers, Consultants, Bio-Medical Engineers, Legal Officer, Pharmacist, and Office Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 40 years for General Category and 18 to 45 years for SC/ST/OBC/Govt. Employees/Women as on 01.01.2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for General Manager in MPPHSCL 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly contractual pay for General Manager (Inventory) and General Manager (IT) is Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Office Assistant in MPPHSCL 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly contractual pay for Office Assistant is Rs. 22,100/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through MP Online at mpphscl.mp.gov.in. No offline applications will be accepted.

faq.question: Q7. Is MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. All positions under MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026 are on a contract or deputation basis and do not confer any right to permanent or regular employment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of shortlisting by MP Online, a written examination conducted by MP Online, followed by an interview by the MPPHSCL HR Committee / Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q9. Can I correct my application after submission?
faq.answer: Yes. A correction window is available from 22nd June 2026 to 25th June 2026 to fix errors in the submitted application.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the jurisdiction for any legal dispute related to MPPHSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All legal disputes related to this recruitment will be settled within the jurisdiction of Bhopal court only.
